metadata.title: Restaurant | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered restaurant management platform for all your hospitality operations — from point of sale and table booking to inventory management and staff scheduling.

hero.title: Restaurant
hero.description: AdonERP offers everything your restaurant needs to manage point of sale, inventory, staff, reservations, purchasing, and services from one platform.
hero.testimonialQuote: AdonERP improved resource management, making planning and invoicing more efficient, enhancing communication and collaboration across our team.

posSection.title: Take your orders with precision
posSection.description: Manage restaurant orders, floor operations, split bills and payments with an intuitive point-of-sale interface.

bookingSection.title: Table booking made simple
bookingSection.description: Create table bookings, manage reservations, and organize restaurant floor plans with clear visual tools.

inventorySection.title: Never ever run
inventorySection.description: Automate purchase orders and manage replenishment so your kitchen always has the ingredients it needs.

planningSection.title: Plan your services
planningSection.subtitle: like a pro
planningSection.description: Schedule staff, organize shifts, manage planning and keep your restaurant team aligned every day.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Smart restaurant tools for service, reservations, stock management, and team coordination from one platform.

list.title: Compatible with any device
list.description: Works perfectly on tablets, laptops, desktops, and kitchen display systems.

list.title: Custom floor plans
list.description: Design and manage your restaurant layout with drag-and-drop tools.

list.title: Table management
list.description: Track table status, split bills, and manage orders efficiently.

list.title: Purchase Orders
list.description: Create and track purchase orders for ingredients and supplies.

list.title: Table Booking
list.description: Accept online reservations and manage booking calendar.

list.title: Staff Scheduling
list.description: Plan shifts, manage attendance, and optimize labor costs.

list.title: Replenishment
list.description: Automated reordering when stock reaches minimum levels.

list.title: Planning
list.description: Organize services, events, and daily operations seamlessly.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your restaurant operation, inventory, reservations, and team management.

testimonials.name: Chef Antonio Rossi
testimonials.content: AdonERP improved resource management, making planning and invoicing more efficient, enhancing communication and collaboration across our team.

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.content: From table bookings to inventory management, AdonERP transformed how we run our restaurant. The POS is incredibly intuitive and our staff loves it.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for restaurants and hospitality.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a restaurant management workflow that helps your team serve faster, manage reservations, and scale from one location to many.
